Operation 'getNotes' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_context. While the summary is adequate, the description lacks details about the response structure and available filtering/pagination options. AI agents need to understand what data is returned and what query parameters are available to effectively use this operation.

data.current_description: Retrieve a list of notes owned by the authenticated user.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve a list of all notes owned by the authenticated user. Returns an array of note summaries containing metadata such as title, creation date, last modified date, and access permissions. Supports pagination and filtering options.
data.reasoning: While the summary is adequate, the description lacks details about the response structure and available filtering/pagination options. AI agents need to understand what data is returned and what query parameters are available to effectively use this operation.

data.current_description: Create a new note for the authenticated user.
data.description_suggestion: Create a new note for the authenticated user. Accepts a CreateNoteRequest containing the note title, content, and optional metadata. Returns the newly created note object with a unique noteId, creation timestamp, and default permissions. The note is immediately accessible to the authenticated user.
data.reasoning: The description is too minimal. It doesn't explain what inputs are required (referencing CreateNoteRequest schema), what the response contains, or the initial state of the created note. AI agents need this information to construct proper requests and handle responses.

data.current_description: Retrieve a single note by its ID.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve a single note by ID
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve a single note by its unique noteId. Requires the noteId path parameter. Returns the complete note object including content, metadata, permissions, and last modification details. The authenticated user must have access permissions to retrieve the note.

data.current_description: Update the content or permissions of an existing note.
data.description_suggestion: Update an existing note's content or permissions using a PATCH request. Requires the noteId path parameter and an UpdateNoteRequest body specifying which fields to modify. Supports partial updates - only provided fields are modified. Returns the updated note object. The authenticated user must have edit permissions on the note.

message: Operation 'deleteNote' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description lacks critical information about side effects (permanent deletion, irreversibility), permission requirements, and response format. data.current_description: Delete a note by its ID.
data.description_suggestion: Permanently delete a note by its noteId. Requires the noteId path parameter. The authenticated user must have delete permissions on the note. This action is irreversible and removes the note and all associated data. Returns a 204 No Content response on successful deletion.
data.reasoning: Description lacks critical information about side effects (permanent deletion, irreversibility), permission requirements, and response format. AI agents need to understand the destructive nature of this operation and its consequences.
